/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX14.0.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -m64 CMakeFiles/min_test.dir/min/test.c.o CMakeFiles/min_test.dir/min/test_funcs.c.o -o bin/min_test  libgsl.a libgslcblas.a -lm
